title: Itertools, Infinite Streams, and Bounded Pipelines · Transformation Lens: Itertools Building Blocks
summary: Create schedule combinations and rolling windows without materializing an unbounded search space. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp itertools building blocks increment in a lazy scheduling and windowing toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Combine chain, repeat, cycle, count, and islice with explicit termination.
Close generators and preserve cleanup behavior during early exit and exceptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
